overview.description: Test with vars using in expected files
overview.name: Insert vars in expected files

var.comment: Create var for random value that consists of two integers
var.name: numeric

var.comment: Create var for random value that consists of twenty random alphanumeric chars
var.name: alphabetic

var.comment: Create var for random value that consists of 10 alphanumeric chars
var.name: alphanumeric

condition.comment: Create condition for check correct work of var generate 'numeric'
condition.name: numeric

condition.comment: Create condition for check correct work of var generate 'alphabetic'
condition.name: alphabetic

condition.comment: Create condition for check correct work of var generate 'alphanumeric'
condition.name: alphanumeric

condition.comment: Create condition for check correct work of var generate 'regex'
condition.name: regex

http.comment: Send news via API using random variable 'numeric'
Send news via API using random variable 'alphabetic'
Send news via API using random variable 'alphanumeric'
Send news via API using random variable 'regex'

var.comment: Create sql var with news number
var.name: newsNumber

sql.query: SELECT newsNumber FROM news WHERE newsName LIKE "%slights%"

mysql.comment: Conduct SELECT query for using all types of vars created previously
mysql.query: SELECT * FROM news WHERE newsName LIKE "%slights%"

migrate.comment: Check ability to migrate test dataset
migrate.name: POSTGRES

postgres.comment: Check ability to get new news data with SQL query

var.comment: Create var for the value 'id' to the previous expected_file to get the desired value
var.name: idFromPostgres

var.comment: Create var for html content from jsonFromFile variable
var.name: htmlFromExpectedVar

var.comment: Create var for url inside html from htmlFromExpectedVar variable
var.name: urlFromHtml

assert.comment: Assert that urlFromHtml variable equals to actual url from html content

equal.comment: Assert for check that two contents is equal

var.comment: Create a variable for the value 'id' from expected file of postgres query
var.name: idFromPostgres

assert.comment: Assert that idFromPostgres variable equals to actual id from expected_2.json

equal.comment: Assert for check that two contents is equal
